data.title: Document and integrate all binary/script/executables into CLAUDE.md
data.description:
## Goal

Inform and add all binary/script/executables to [CLAUDE.md](<http://CLAUDE.md>) and create a milestone for implementation of each via GSD.

## Context

Promoted from GSD note (2026-03-20). Currently `bin/healthcheck` is the only documented script. The environment likely has more executables that should be discoverable.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] All binary/script/executables in the environment are documented in [CLAUDE.md](<http://CLAUDE.md>)
- [ ] A milestone is created via GSD for implementing each executable

## Source

GSD todo: `001-inform-add-binaries-executables`
